name: Luna Open Demo WhatsApp Stripe Test Link Pipe

meta.description: Stage 27demo-m Stripe TEST link pipe. STAGING/DEMO ONLY — INACTIVE in repo. Meta WhatsApp webhook → normalize → guard phone_number_id 1152900101233109 → POST /staff/bot/open-demo-whatsapp-inbound-dry-run with create_stripe_test_link_confirmed:true (Staff API gates link create). Resolves existing draft by guest phone or optional booking_code/payment_draft_id. No send_live_reply_confirmed. No send_payment_link_whatsapp_confirmed. No booking write flags. Staff API is brain.

nodes.name: Webhook - Open Demo Stripe Test Link Inbound

Respond - Stripe Test Link Pipe Disabled

nodes.name: Code - Map Staff API Stripe Test Link Response

parameters.jsCode:
// Stage 27demo-m — map Staff API stripe test link response
const http = $input.first().json;
const normalized = $('Code - Normalize Meta WhatsApp Inbound').first().json;
const statusCode = http.statusCode || http.status || 0;
const api = http.body || http;

const proposed = api.review && api.review.proposed_luna_reply
  ? api.review.proposed_luna_reply
  : (api.proposed_luna_reply || null);

return [{
  json: {
    stripe_test_link_pipe_mode: true,
    staff_api_status: statusCode,
    staff_api_success: api.success === true,
    sends_whatsapp: api.sends_whatsapp === true,
    whatsapp_sent: api.whatsapp_sent === true,
    live_send_blocked: api.live_send_blocked !== false,
    stripe_link_attempted: api.stripe_link_attempted === true,
    stripe_link_created: api.stripe_link_created === true,
    stripe_link_reused: api.stripe_link_reused === true,
    stripe_mode: api.stripe_mode || 'test',
    booking_code: api.booking_code || null,
    booking_id: api.booking_id || null,
    payment_draft_id: api.payment_draft_id || null,
    stripe_checkout_session_id: api.stripe_checkout_session_id || null,
    stripe_checkout_url: api.stripe_checkout_url || null,
    payment_link_sent: api.payment_link_sent === true,
    confirmation_sent: api.confirmation_sent === true,
    payment_truth_applied: api.payment_truth_applied === true,
    create_stripe_test_link_confirmed: api.create_stripe_test_link_confirmed === true,
    demo_stripe_link_blocked: api.demo_stripe_link_blocked === true,
    demo_stripe_link_gate_code: api.demo_stripe_link_gate_code || null,
    slim_guest_context_for_next_turn: api.slim_guest_context_for_next_turn || null,
    proposed_luna_reply_preview: proposed ? String(proposed).slice(0, 120) : null,
    guest_phone: normalized.guest_phone,
    wamid: normalized.wamid,
    message_text: normalized.message_text,
    note: 'Stage 27demo-m: n8n pipe only — Staff API brain; Stripe TEST link flag only.'
  }
}];
